title: WARLERY'S HQ
description: The World is getting conquered by Otherworld entites, so, it's time to Protect your Base/house and destroy all fools!
body:
####                                                        **        Need Geckolib, JEI mod Recommended**

Thanks for 14k Downloads!

 

Enjoy the discord group!

https://discord.gg/f4E46AV4kJ

   

**WARLERYS HQ**

 

_The World is getting conquered by other world entities!, so it's to defend your base or house with 11 Types of Turrets and Weapons with Posibility to Upgrade them!, Assault and Conquer +55 Structures like Enemy bases, Friendly bases and Dangerous bases to get their loot and being more stronger every DAY, Defeat Great and Challenger 3 Bosses to get their Big Loot while Defeat all +15 enemies._

_Enjoy more than +30 Raid Operations, Ores, Crates with good loot and some new weapons to make The great war in your base and Show who is the best commander in the world!_

_Good Musics, Great sounds, Great History and Great Gameplay are waiting for you!_

_Credits:_

_Music By:  **Steve Jablonsky and Jonathan Flood (Transformers the game Ost) **_

_Entities "Piklo Enginner" and "Vortex Ancient" By: **ItzPukilo**_ 

PLEASE, INSTALL "JEI" FOR SEE AL RECIPES!

Warning!, this mod contains explicit language.

  ## THE NEW VERSION 1.3.2 "The Re-Fresh Update" IT'S HERE!   DETAILS, FIXES, IMPROVES UPDATE!                                   _**WARLERYS HQ V1.3.2**_                                           - WORLD -                                     ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1026831/description_595ec60c-0f12-44b6-ac63-e2bf8fb04b37.png)     -Added 4 New Medium Raids         -Legion invasion series l ll lll lV V.         -Screwfield.     -Added 1 New Hard Raid         -Legion invasion V     -Added 2 New Easy Raids         -Snowy Assault         -Bad Mornings     -New Method to obtain raid blocks!         -All of the Raid Crates can be obtain by Trade Crates too!.     -New Method to obtain Generators!         -Try luck and obtain them every time when you break a Piklo Trader Exclusive Box!         -This ones are at Lv1.     -Now Bulldozer (Called "devkiller" in below versions) will just destroy instantly turrets.         -Can be craftable.         -This item are now in survival too!.     -Improved Weapons!.         -Added Better Description and Updated Descriptions.         -removed DMG Cooldown.         -Better Mechanics         -Better Friendly fire (no friendly fire PVP)                                         - TURRETS -                                ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1026831/description_362c1f90-7ffc-45b1-8599-869c1ebb84d0.png)     -Better friendly fire         -entities who aren't turrets, player, piklos and some animals will recieve all the dmg.     -Adjuted Hit boxes from turrets     -Adjusted Group Recipes to make easier to find in the crafting table.     -Adjusted Eye Height from turrets     -Removed DMG Cooldowns from entities and Turrets     -Improved Turrets, Miniturrets and Temporally Turrets.     -Animations when Deployed.     -Now Turrets have SOLID HITBOX         -That means now turrets can't move by pushes and more!.         -Stay solid like a Tree!     -Added Track Shots to Sniper turret and Bull Cannon.     -Reduced Attack Range to Machine Gun         -3 Attack Range     -Fixed Mines         -Correctly Targets.     -Better Recipes to turrets         -Betters recipes to create turrets         -More easy to make. \- Added All Mortar Levels, Adjustments, and Crate.                                      - ENEMIES and NPC -                                       ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1026831/description_baa51b14-379e-4010-9673-97994e520796.png)        -Added New Enemy!         -Vortex Seeker             -Similarity with Vorxquito             -If detects piklos, turrets or player, he will call some vortex troops!     -Added New Enemy!         -Flamerous.             -Walking Flamethrower troop             -After death make a little explotion, be carefull.     -Added New Voice lines to piklos.         -Now Contracted Piklos call for heal when it below 15 HP     -Fixed Minor Bugs.     -Improved Enemies         -Removed Dmg Cooldown         -Added Better Friendly Fire.         -Calibrated Sounds.         -better Step Height.         -Reduced Some Proyectiles Hit boxes from enemies.         -Fixed Dumb Ai from some enemies.         -Added Kill Quotes Respectivelly to enemies who can talk.         -Added Synced Attacks + DMG variants to Melee Enemies.         -Reduced XP Drops from Small Enemies.         -Balanced Bosses:             -Brawl:                 -+400 HP                 -Better Final Explotion, AOE DMG which doens't affect own enemies and items.                 -New Loot Table.             -Mech:                 -Proyectiles now have AOE DMG.                 -Improved Skills.                 -Improved AfterDeath.                 -+400 HP.             -Vortex Ancient:                 -+550 HP                 -Fixed Dumb AI                 -Synced Attacks                 -Improved Skills and attacks     -Improved Piklo Bomber.     -Balanced Piklo Copter         -Adjust Dumb AI         - +11.7 DMG, +3 Knockback     -Fixed Bug in Piklo trader casino.         -A bug fixed which items disappear when winning an item.     -Fixed Blowerturret Explotion and added Trackshots to headhunter.                                          My Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@Warlerys-du5ds?sub\_confirmation=1                                       My Ko-fi! if you want to support me!: https://ko-fi.com/warlerysdev                                                             ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1026831/description_99f42c95-24c5-4f34-b9a8-ed99ca936b4a.png)
